creator: lightside@gmx.com
text:
Created attachment 173155
Proposed patch (since 418808 revision)

Hello Kubilay Kocak.

I did (minimal) build tests for FreeBSD 9.3 amd64 in poudriere and FreeBSD 10.2 amd64 for native build. This revealed the issue with strchrnul function, which appeared in FreeeBSD 10.0, according to strchrnul(3) man page. The maintainer did FreeBSD < 10.0 restriction before ports r418721 changes. Therefore, I propose to return such restriction, in slightly different form (i.e. BROKEN_FreeBSD_9 message).

Also, I removed PORTREVISION bump, because this is not required.
